chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْغُدُوِّ إِلَى عَرَفَاتٍ وَ حُدُودِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 163 – The morning departure to Arafaat and its boundaries

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن الفضلء - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/119)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن الفضلء - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/119)
text: هُ قِيلَ لَهُ أَيُّمَا أَفْضَلُ الْحَرَمُ أَوْ عَرَفَةُ فَقَالَ الْحَرَمُ فَقِيلَ وَ كَيْفَ لَمْ تَكُنْ عَرَفَاتٌ فِي الْحَرَمِ فَقَالَ هَكَذَا جَعَلَهَا اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hafs Bin Al Bakhtary and Hisham Bin Al Hakam,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having been said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Which of the two is superior, the Harram or Arafaat?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The Harram’. So it was said, ‘And how come Arafaat did not happen to be inside the Harram?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘This is how Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Made it to be’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Hafs ibn al-Bakhtariy and Hisham ibn al-Hakam who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked, ‘Is ‘Arafat, more important or al-Haram (the sacred area)?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Al-Haram (the sacred area) is more important.’ It was asked, ‘Why is ‘Arafat not in al-Haram (the sacred area)?’ He (the Imam) said, ‘This is how Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, has made it.’”
